summary: Average audience recording with reduced treble but decent bass; no specific performance details were mentioned.
review: The sole reviewer notes that this is an audience tape and had to cut the treble completely, leaving only enough low end to feel the beat. The resulting sound quality is middling (3‑star rating) and there are no comments on the musical performance itself.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review with a neutral 3‑star rating; the comment focuses on recording limitations and provides no insight into the show’s musical quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Treble was reduced to zero by the listener due to harshness/muddiness; low end is sufficient to define rhythm but overall clarity is limited.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details were provided in the review.
